title: Configure Cloudflare production environment variables
description: Cloudflare Pages production environment variables are configured/synced by the user. Confirmed Wrangler can access the senshac Pages project and list deployments with CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID active. Active env set includes Tina, Turnstile, Resend, contact email, branch, and NODE_OPTIONS values from private env.

title: Test contact form in production
description: Production contact form tested on preview.senshac.com. Contact page returns 200 and renders hx-post /es/api/contact plus Turnstile widget. Same-origin POST with valid required fields returned 200 Spanish success HTML. Required-field validation returns 400. Cross-site POST returns 403. Cloudflare Pages secret list confirms RESEND_API_KEY and TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY are present as encrypted production secrets. Note: automated success submission used qa@example.com and likely sent one production email.

title: Run final QA across all pages
description: Final production QA across pages using browser-cli/manual browser automation plus curl checks. Scope: multilingual homepage, about, services, projects index/detail, contact, legal/privacy, admin redirect, robots/sitemap/llms, responsive/mobile, console errors, and core SEO/static assets.
closeReason: Production QA passed after deploying Tina admin Rocket Loader opt-out and Hyperscript side-effect import fix. Route matrix returned 200s, contact negative tests returned 400/403, admin fallback no longer appears, and browser-cli smoke showed no public-page browserInit runtime error.

title: Add founder photo placeholder
description: Pending content task from migrated memory: add or replace the founder photo placeholder.

title: Evaluate remaining WordPress migration assets
description: Content migration memory still lists fonts/images/custom cursor and LocalBusiness JSON-LD follow-ups. Review what is stale versus still needed before closing the migration archive.

title: Add TinaCMS visual editing for Astro pages
description: Implement TinaCMS visual/contextual editing for preview.senshac.com using the Astro-specific @tinacms/astro flow. Start with one narrow page, then extend the pattern to core pages and project pages. Scope includes Tina integration, requestWithMetadata data loading, TinaIsland renderers, tinaField markers, tina-island endpoint, and preview verification.

title: Resolve Resend receiving MX conflict
description: Resend receiving DNS fixed on inbound.senshac.com. User confirmed Ireland/eu-west-1. After Resend/Cloudflare automatic changes briefly changed inbound MX to feedback-smtp.eu-west-1.amazonses.com, corrected it back to inbound-smtp.eu-west-1.amazonaws.com priority 10 TTL 3600. Root senshac.com Google Workspace MX and preview.senshac.com Pages CNAME left unchanged.
closeReason: Resend receiving MX added on inbound.senshac.com using confirmed Ireland/eu-west-1 target; root Google Workspace MX left unchanged.

title: Organize TinaCMS admin collections
description: Reduce the TinaCMS admin sidebar from duplicated per-locale collections into a smaller content-type-oriented collection model: Site, Pages, Portfolio, Legal, and System.

title: Define target TinaCMS sidebar collection map
description: Document the desired Tina admin collection structure and exact collection names/labels before editing tina/config.ts. Include Site Configuration, Home, About, Services, Contact, Projects, Legal Pages, and Translations. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Consolidate Tina page collections by content type
description: Replace per-locale Home/About/Services/Contact Tina collections with one collection per page type using match.include patterns over {es,ca,en}. Preserve allowedActions and visual editing routers. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Consolidate Tina project collections across locales
description: Replace projects_es/projects_ca/projects_en with one Projects collection spanning src/content/projects/{es,ca,en}. Keep project creation behavior, filename handling, and locale-aware visual editing router. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Consolidate Tina legal collections across locales
description: Replace legal_es/legal_ca/legal_en with one Legal Pages collection spanning src/content/legal/{es,ca,en}. Preserve MDX format and locale-aware router. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Consolidate Tina translation collections
description: Replace translations_es/translations_ca/translations_en with one Translations collection, while keeping create/delete disabled and making locale files easy to identify in the admin. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Regenerate Tina types after collection consolidation
description: Run the Tina build/generation step after collection names change, review generated GraphQL names, and keep generated files aligned. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Update Tina data loaders for consolidated collections
description: Replace per-locale getHomeEs/getHomeCa/etc. loader duplication with loaders matching the consolidated Tina collections and locale-aware relative paths. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Update Tina island registry after collection consolidation
description: Replace per-locale island registry entries with consolidated collection island entries where possible, preserving TinaIsland fetch/propsFromData behavior. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Update Astro routes for consolidated Tina collections
description: Update home, about, services, and project detail routes to call the consolidated loaders/islands while preserving all locale visual editing routes. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Verify Tina admin sidebar organization
description: Use browser-cli against /admin to confirm the Tina sidebar shows the reduced collection list and that collection links open visual editing routes where expected. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Verify consolidated Tina rollout on preview
description: Run astro check, build, deploy to Cloudflare Pages, Betterleaks, and smoke-test all localized home/about/services/project routes for Tina bridge and field markers. Parent epic: senshac-c242.

title: Add fx Flox command suite
description: Create an extensible fx helper for Flox-backed project workflows while keeping dx as the primitive direnv exec wrapper. Start with subcommands for run/check/build/deploy/ready/smoke and document the command surface in README/AGENTS.

title: Fix TinaCloud schema mismatch after consolidated collections
description: Tina admin on preview.senshac.com reports GraphQL Schema Mismatch and GetCollection failed: Expected to find collection named home. Local generated schema has home/about/services/projects collections, so TinaCloud indexed schema for main is stale or failed to update after consolidated collection rollout.
closeReason: Updated tina/tina-lock.json to the consolidated Tina collection schema so TinaCloud can index collection home.

title: Fix Tina visual editing on singleton pages
